title: Lifeguards on duty at these beaches
bodyText:
[{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS -  Lifeguards are on duty daily from 09:00 to 18:00 during the holiday season.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Lifeguards are on duty daily from 09:00 to 18:00 during the holiday season."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Beaches and dates:","html":"Beaches and dates:"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"• Blue Flag and main beaches (1 December - 2 February): Little Brak River, Santos, De Bakke, Dias, Hartenbos, Glentana and Great Brak River Mouth.• Other beaches (13 December - 11 January): Gleniqua, Onderwyser, Outeniqua, Dwarsweg, Pienaar, Suiderkruis, Souwesia, Nooitgedacht, Koffiehuis, Bay View, Tweekuilen, Point (tidal pool and Poort), Boggomsbaai, Vleesbaai and Hartenbosmond.","html":"• Blue Flag and main beaches (1 December - 2 February): Little Brak River, Santos, De Bakke, Dias, Hartenbos, Glentana and Great Brak River Mouth.
• Other beaches (13 December - 11 January): Gleniqua, Onderwyser, Outeniqua, Dwarsweg, Pienaar, Suiderkruis, Souwesia, Nooitgedacht, Koffiehuis, Bay View, Tweekuilen, Point (tidal pool and Poort), Boggomsbaai, Vleesbaai and Hartenbosmond."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Mossel Bay Municipality said it is important to note that Dana Bay is not suitable for swimming due to dangerous currents. It urged beach-goers not to swim in this area.","html":"The Mossel Bay Municipality said it is important to note that Dana Bay is not suitable for swimming due to dangerous currents. It urged beach-goers not to swim in this area."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Lifeguards on duty at these beaches
